text:

    www/py-yarl: add ${PY_SETUPTOOLS} to BUILD_DEPENDS

    devel/py-wheel is not a PEP-517 build backend; add the real one.
    Once the linked PR is committed, this build will fail.

    With hat: python
    PR: 270510
